sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n96419" key="steiro/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">στειρότης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ητος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n96419.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">sterility</tr_>, cj. Wytt. in <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.366c</biblScope></bibl>, for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">στερρ-</foreign>.</sense> </entryFree>
